title: New 'Urgent Document' Scam Targets Corporate Employees
summary: A widespread phishing campaign is using fake 'urgent document' notifications to trick employees into revealing their login credentials. The emails contain links to a sophisticated fake login page.
text_sample:
Subject: Action Required: Review Important Document

Dear Employee,

A critical document requires your immediate review. Please sign in to the secure portal using your company credentials to access it.

Click here: http://sharepoint-corporate-docs.com/viewer

This link will expire in 2 hours.

Thank you,
IT Services

title: Voicemail Phishing (Vishing) on the Rise
summary: Attackers are now using fake voicemail notifications to lure victims. The emails claim a new voicemail is waiting and provide a malicious link to 'listen' to the message.
text_sample:
Subject: You have a new Voicemail Message

Hello,

You have received a new voicemail from +1-800-555-1234.

Duration: 0:45 seconds

To listen to this message, please access the secure portal below:

Listen Now: http://external-voicemail-service.net/play

Regards,
Your Phone System
